improvement_hint: Filter out generic 'About Kitakyushu' / 'Cherry Blossoms in Fukuoka' nav-chrome scrapes that mismatch the family-gourmet intent; surface 博多ラーメン / 水炊き / がめ煮 / もつ鍋 canonical family-friendly food anchors.

Add a 'climatically impossible' advisory for tropical/palm-beach queries in Hokkaido; explicitly note no palm-tree resorts exist, suggest Okinawa/Kagoshima alternatives instead of defaulting to lavender/onsen blocks.

Query is German; response is in JA/EN. Add a German localization_directive block and surface a canonical_free_destinations cluster (parks, Meiji Jingu, Hamarikyu garden free zones, shrine grounds, observation decks) for the budget-traveler intent.

Canonical_festivals correctly anchors 奥三河花祭 at top (RULE E boost). Items list is dominated by hanabi/other Aichi matsuri; could trim irrelevant fireworks for sharper focus on the specific kagura ritual.

Query asks about dying pottery traditions; response surfaces UNESCO performing arts (Bunraku/Kabuki) at the top of items. Add a canonical_dying_crafts / 後継者不足 sub-cluster anchoring 備前焼 / 越前焼 / 大堀相馬焼 / 出石焼 etc. with successor-shortage notes.

Typhoon-aftermath query needs real-time closures/road status (Naruto whirlpools, Iya Valley access) — not DMO directory. Add an advisory pointing to JMA / NEXCO Shikoku / 徳島県道路情報 live links, plus typical-typhoon-affected outdoor sites in Tokushima.

Query specifies 草津温泉 + 記念日プラン; canonical_luxury_ryokan returns generic Gunma onsen ryokan (奈良屋, 草津ナウ) but main hotels list is dominated by non-Kusatsu 秘湯を守る会 ryokan in other Gunma towns. Add a Kusatsu-municipality filter when the query toponym matches.

city='佐渡' filter wrongly tagged many Niigata mainland events (魚沼芝桜, 越後三条ヒメサユリ, 長岡花火, 北方文化博物館) as municipality='佐渡市'. Fix municipality assignment from spot URL/source before filtering. Sado-specific family options (佐渡金山, トキの森公園, 尖閣湾, たらい舟) are buried.

Korean stroller-on-beach query gets castles/gusuku and dark-sky sites, no beach accessibility data. Add a canonical_accessible_beaches cluster for Okinawa (Emerald Beach, Naminoue, Manza, Sun Marina) with stroller/sand-mat access notes.

Query asks Osaka→Nara day-trip rail times. Response gives Nara-prefecture spots + nearest stations but no Osaka↔Nara routing (近鉄難波↔奈良 ~40min, JR大阪↔奈良 ~50min). Add origin↔Nara hub time estimates when query implies a day-trip from a specific origin city.

Wheelchair / no-step / accessible bath constraint completely ignored; hotels list is dominated by Yokohama apartments and Aoki House hostel. Add a canonical_accessible_ryokan cluster (バリアフリー対応, ハートビル / Universal Design certified) and filter Hakone properties by 段差なし / 介助浴 attribute.
Hybrid search returns relevant Shizuoka 富士山 spots + DMO portals. Yamanashi result is reasonable cross-prefecture surfacing. Could add canonical_iconic_landmarks for Mt Fuji and 富士五湖 hub guidance.

Koyasan shukubo coverage is excellent and 精進料理 vegan-suitability is described in many entries. Could add an explicit 'vegan / 完全菜食' flag where confirmed and note that 精進料理 typically excludes dashi-fish but verify on booking.

Wheelchair-accessible temples constraint ignored; canonical blocks list 清水寺 (stairs+slopes), 金閣寺 (gravel), 嵐山 bamboo grove without accessibility flags. Add a canonical_wheelchair_accessible_temples cluster (西本願寺, 東本願寺, 平等院 main areas, Tofukuji 通天橋 limitations) and surface 多目的トイレ availability.
Canonical_festivals correctly hoists 弘前さくらまつり with period + description (RULE E boost). Advisory about empty items list is clean. Could include Hirosaki Park night-up timing + 花筏 peak window detail.

canonical_luxury_ryokan correctly surfaces アマン京都 / 俵屋 / 柊家 / 星のや京都. But main hotels list is dominated by AB / APA business hotels and Hilton chains — apply luxury_ryokan filter when query intent is ハネムーン / 高級 to demote business hotels.

Excellent Takikawa historical narrative covering origin (滝川種羊場 / 松尾ジンギスカン) + 札幌式 vs 滝川式 distinction. Could trim duplicate Sapporo travel-site nav-chrome and add explicit reference to 北海道遺産 designation date.

canonical_luxury_ryokan surfaces 強羅花壇 / 箱根吟遊 / 界 箱根 correctly. But main hotels list returns Aoki House hostel + UR apartments + Yokohama motels — filter to Hakone-municipality + ryokan/luxury_resort type when query is honeymoon-focused.
canonical_romantic_destinations correctly anchors 鍋冠山 / 軍艦島 / グラバー園 night as alternatives to 稲佐山. Could add 出島ワーフ夜景 / 長崎水辺の森公園 specifically tagged as couple-romantic vs the more general yakei spots.

canonical_halal_food_destinations cluster is strong: mosques, Niseko halal restaurants, NCT prayer rooms, Halal Gourmet Japan directory. Hybrid results dominated by generic Hokkaido tourism nav-chrome — demote those when canonical_halal block fired.
canonical_iconic_illuminations correctly surfaces なばなの里 with period + scale + LED count. Kansai koyo/sakura blocks are off-topic for the illumination query — apply intent-aware cluster suppression.

Query is 能登半島 family seafood; results are dominated by Kanazawa 近江町市場 / 金沢旅物語 nav-chrome and 白山市. Add 能登半島-specific filter for 輪島朝市 / 七尾 / 和倉温泉 fish markets; surface 香箱ガニ / ノドグロ / 能登カキ as canonical Noto seafood anchors.

Portuguese localization fired with proper translations for MAFF GI items (Rakkyo, Brócolo, Melancia). User asked specifically about 松葉ガニ — surface a canonical Matsuba crab anchor (鳥取県境港 seasonal designation) at the top since it's explicitly mentioned in the query.

canonical_premium_brand_meat correctly anchors 鹿児島黒豚 with Berkshire ancestry + 300-year history + sweet-potato feed (RULE E boost). Could explicitly link to 鹿児島県畜産協会 or JA brand certification source for the brandization-history detail.

plan_feasibility_check correctly flags infeasible 1038km Tokyo↔Yakushima with explicit 'multi-day or air travel' notes — 69.5h car estimate by haversine is appropriate sanity output. Could add air-route alternative (HND→KOJ→Yakushima ferry ~5h one-way) and explicit 'cannot day-trip' verdict.
